subtitle: Introducing MI techniques to Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures trained on clinical encounter sequences. Targeting ML4H 2026.

heroImage.alt: Diagram of the shared-encoder stop-gradient JEPA architecture, with VICReg loss components annotated.
heroImage.caption: [1]. The model predicts embedding $k$ from $k-1$ prior encounters, penalized for representations that collapse, correlate, or fail to predict (VicReg loss).
